revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:八白土星]]
{{More citations needed|date=December 2018|qq=}} {| class="floatright wikitable" style="text-align:center; font-family:serif;" |+ Post-Heaven Lo Shu Square |- | 4 || 9 || 2 |- | 3 || 5 || 7 |- | style="background-color:#FF80C0;" | 8 || 1 || 6 |} {| class="floatright wikitable" style="text-align:center; font-family:serif;" |+ When Happaku is in the center |- | 7 || 3 || 5 |- | 6 || style="background-color:#FF80C0;" | 8 || 1 |- | 2 || 4 || 9 |} '''Happaku Dosei''' (八白土星) is one of the {{ill|Nine Stars|ja|九星|1=Nine Stars|2=ja|3=九星|lt=Nine Stars|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nine Stars|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nine Stars|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nine Stars|qq=}} used in {{ill|Calendar|en|Calendar|qid=Q12132|lt=calendars|1=Calendar}} and {{ill|Divination|en|Divination|qid=Q1043197|lt=fortune-telling|1=Divination}}. Among the Nine Stars, other Earth-associated stars include {{ill|Nikoku Dosei|ja|二黒土星|1=Second Black Earth Star|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nikoku Dosei|13=User:Immanuelle/Second Black Earth Star|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nikoku Dosei|13=User:Immanuelle/Second Black Earth Star|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nikoku Dosei|13=User:Immanuelle/Second Black Earth Star|qq=}} and {{ill|Goō Dosei|1=Fifth Yellow Earth Star|ja|五黄土星|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Goō Dosei|13=User:Immanuelle/Fifth Yellow Earth Star|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Goō Dosei|13=User:Immanuelle/Fifth Yellow Earth Star|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Goō Dosei|13=User:Immanuelle/Fifth Yellow Earth Star|qq=}}. However, Happaku Dosei represents solid and stable earth formations such as tall mountains and embankments. == Attributes == * {{ill|Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)|en|Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)|qid=Q218652|lt=Five Elements (Wuxing)|1=Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)}} - {{ill|Earth (wuxing)|ru|Земля (у-син)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|lt=Earth (土)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|14=zh|15=Earth (土)|16=zh|17=Earth (土)}} * {{ill|Bagua|en|Bagua|qid=Q340846|lt=Bagua|1=Bagua}} - {{ill|Gèn (Bagua)|ja|艮|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gèn (Bagua)|lt=Gen (艮)|qq=}} * {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|qid=Q1190985|lt=Ten Heavenly Stems|1=Heavenly Stems}} - {{ill|Tsuchinoe (戊)|ja|戊|zh|戊|gan|戊|hak|Vú (thiên-kôn)|ja|Tsuchinoe|simple|User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|vi|Mậu (Thiên can)|za|Fouh (diengan)|zh-min-nan|Bō͘ (Thian-kan)|zh-yue|戊|zh|戊|qq=}}, {{ill|Tsuchinoto (己)|ja|己|zh|己|gan|己|hak|Kí (thiên-kôn)|ja|Tsuchinoto|simple|User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|vi|Kỷ (Thiên can)|za|Geij (diengan)|zh-min-nan|Kí (Thian-kan)|zh-yue|己 (天干)|zh|己 (天干)|qq=}} * {{ill|Earthly Branches|en|Earthly Branches|qid=Q1072961|lt=Twelve Earthly Branches|1=Earthly Branches}} - [[Ox (zodiac)|Ox (丑)]], {{ill|Tiger (zodiac)|en|Tiger (zodiac)|qid=Q740762|lt=Tiger (寅)|1=Tiger (zodiac)}} * Season - Winter Doyō * Direction - Northeast * Month - January, February * Time - 1:00–5:00 * Number - Five, Ten * Color - Yellow * Taste - Sweet == Symbolic Meanings == * Transformation, accumulation, stillness, height, {{ill|Inheritance|en|Inheritance|qid=Q200303|lt=inheritance|1=Inheritance}}, termination and restart, {{ill|Joint|en|Joint|qid=Q9644|lt=joints|1=Joint}}, {{ill|Real estate|en|Real estate|qid=Q684740|lt=real estate|1=Real estate}}, purity, youth * Reform, mountains, hospitality, ears, nose, lower back, muscles, nobility, joints throughout the body, back, spine == Relationships with Other Stars == * Generating Cycle (相生) - {{ill|Roppaku Kinsei|1=Sixth White Metal Star|ja|六白金星|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Roppaku Kinsei|13=User:Immanuelle/Sixth White Metal Star|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Roppaku Kinsei|13=User:Immanuelle/Sixth White Metal Star|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Roppaku Kinsei|13=User:Immanuelle/Sixth White Metal Star|qq=}} (Earth produces Metal), {{ill|Shichiseki Kinsei|1=Seventh Red Metal Star|ja|七赤金星|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shichiseki Kinsei|13=User:Immanuelle/Seventh Red Metal Star|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shichiseki Kinsei|13=User:Immanuelle/Seventh Red Metal Star|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shichiseki Kinsei|13=User:Immanuelle/Seventh Red Metal Star|qq=}} (Earth produces Metal), {{ill|Kyūshi Kasei|1=Ninth Purple Fire Star|ja|九紫火星|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kyūshi Kasei|13=User:Immanuelle/Ninth Purple Fire Star|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kyūshi Kasei|13=User:Immanuelle/Ninth Purple Fire Star|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kyūshi Kasei|13=User:Immanuelle/Ninth Purple Fire Star|qq=}} (Fire produces Earth) * Overcoming Cycle (相克) - {{ill|Ippaku Suisei|ja|一白水星|1=First White Water Star|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ippaku Suisei|13=User:Immanuelle/First White Water Star|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ippaku Suisei|13=User:Immanuelle/First White Water Star|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ippaku Suisei|13=User:Immanuelle/First White Water Star|qq=}} (Earth overcomes Water), {{ill|Sanpeki Mokusei|ja|三碧木星|1=Third Blue Wood Star|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sanpeki Mokusei|13=User:Immanuelle/Third Blue Wood Star|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sanpeki Mokusei|13=User:Immanuelle/Third Blue Wood Star|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sanpeki Mokusei|13=User:Immanuelle/Third Blue Wood Star|qq=}} (Wood overcomes Earth), {{ill|Shiroku Mokusei|ja|四緑木星|1=Fourth Green Wood Star|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shiroku Mokusei|13=User:Immanuelle/Fourth Green Wood Star|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shiroku Mokusei|13=User:Immanuelle/Fourth Green Wood Star|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shiroku Mokusei|13=User:Immanuelle/Fourth Green Wood Star|qq=}} (Wood overcomes Earth) * Harmonious Relationship (比和) - {{ill|Nikoku Dosei|ja|二黒土星|1=Second Black Earth Star|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nikoku Dosei|13=User:Immanuelle/Second Black Earth Star|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nikoku Dosei|13=User:Immanuelle/Second Black Earth Star|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nikoku Dosei|13=User:Immanuelle/Second Black Earth Star|qq=}}, {{ill|Goō Dosei|1=Fifth Yellow Earth Star|ja|五黄土星|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Goō Dosei|13=User:Immanuelle/Fifth Yellow Earth Star|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Goō Dosei|13=User:Immanuelle/Fifth Yellow Earth Star|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Goō Dosei|13=User:Immanuelle/Fifth Yellow Earth Star|qq=}}, Happaku Dosei == Years in Which Happaku Dosei Occupies the Center == Years in which the remainder when divided by 9 is 3 are Happaku Dosei years. ‥‥- {{ill|1947|en|1947|qid=Q5263|lt=1947|1=1947}} - {{ill|1956|en|1956|qid=Q5221|lt=1956|1=1956}} - {{ill|1965|en|1965|qid=Q2650|lt=1965|1=1965}} - {{ill|1974|en|1974|qid=Q2478|lt=1974|1=1974}} - {{ill|1983|en|1983|qid=Q2434|lt=1983|1=1983}} - {{ill|1992|en|1992|qid=Q2060|lt=1992|1=1992}} - {{ill|2001|en|2001|qid=Q1988|lt=2001|1=2001}} - {{ill|2010|en|2010|qid=Q1995|lt=2010|1=2010}} - {{ill|2019|en|2019|qid=Q25274|lt=2019|1=2019}} - {{ill|2028|en|2028|qid=Q12809|lt=2028|1=2028}} - {{ill|2037|en|2037|qid=Q12120|lt=2037|1=2037}} - {{ill|2046|en|2046|qid=Q49921|lt=2046|1=2046}} - {{ill|2055|en|2055|qid=Q49930|lt=2055|1=2055}} - {{ill|2064|en|2064|qid=Q1044959|lt=2064|1=2064}} - ‥‥ == Nine Stars Comparison Chart == {{main|{{ill|Nine Stars|ja|九星|1=Nine Stars|2=ja|3=九星|lt=Nine Stars|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nine Stars|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nine Stars|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nine Stars|qq=}}|qq=}} {| class="wikitable" !Star !Reading !Five Element !Direction !Branch !Eight Trigram !Color |- !{{ill|First White Water Star|ja|一白水星|1=First White Water Star|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/First White Water Star|13=User:Immanuelle/First White Water Star|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/First White Water Star|13=User:Immanuelle/First White Water Star|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/First White Water Star|13=User:Immanuelle/First White Water Star|qq=}} |Ippaku Suisei |{{ill|Water (wuxing)|lt=Water (水)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Water (wuxing)|2=uk|3=Вода (У-сін)|4=als|5=Wasser in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|6=bcl|7=Tubig (wuxing)|8=vi|9=Thủy (Ngũ hành)|10=pt|11=Água (astrologia)|lt=Water (水)|uk|Вода (У-сін)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/water|lt=Water (水)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Water (wuxing)|lt=Water (水)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Water (wuxing)|2=uk|3=Вода (У-сін)|4=als|5=Wasser in dr chinesische (zodiac)}} |{{ill|Kǎn (Bagua)|ja|坎|12=simple|lt=Kǎn|qq=}} | style="background:white;" |White |- !{{ill|Second Black Earth Star|ja|二黒土星|1=Second Black Earth Star|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Second (Bagua)|ja|坤|12=simple|lt=Kūn|qq=}} | style="background:black;color:white;" |Black |- !{{ill|Third Blue Wood Star|ja|三碧木星|1=Third Blue Wood Star|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Third Blue Wood (wuxing)|10=ca|11=Fusta (wuxing)|12=it|13=Legno (elemento)|14=es|15=Madera (Wu Xing)|16=nl|17=Hout (element)|18=vi|19=Mộc (Ngũ hành)|20=tr|21=Tahta (klasik element)|22=ta|23=மரம் (சீன மெய்யியல்)|2=it|3=Legno (elemento)|4=es|5=Madera (Wu Xing)|6=tr|7=Tahta (klasik element)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|ja|Wood (木)|1=Wood (wuxing)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|2=uk|3=Дерево
